name: Parmesan Tomato Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Combine ricotta cheese, eggs, oregano, salt, and pepper in a bowl until well mixed.
3. Spread half of the mixture over the bottom crust.
4. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
5. Arrange a layer of sliced tomatoes on top.
6. Sprinkle more parmesan cheese over the tomatoes.
7. Spread remaining ricotta mixture over the tomatoes and add more parmesan cheese.
8. Arrange the remaining slices of tomatoes on top and sprinkle with additional parmesan cheese.
9. Place in the oven and bake for 60 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Remove from the oven and allow to cool for 30 minutes before cutting.
11. Garnish with a sprig of fresh oregano and serve warm or at room temperature.
